rows.label: qev086302_MSG0001
rows.name: Good sir! We have your ingredients.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Now you can create that ancient
Nopon remedy you need, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0003
rows.name: Mmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0004
rows.name:
Something wrong? Tora have even
blanker stare than usual.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm pretty sure that's
disappointment, Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0006
rows.name: This not enough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0007
rows.name: Mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0008
rows.name:
Tora still need final
ingredient—guardian etherscale![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0009
rows.name: Oh dear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0010
rows.name: You know it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0011
rows.name: We do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0012
rows.name:
The guardian etherscale is an
exceedingly rare material shed
by a most singular creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0013
rows.name: Urgh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0014
rows.name: A singular creature?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0015
rows.name:
It is known as the Ruler of Fates.
Here, see for yourselves...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0016
rows.name: Hey, it's—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0017
rows.name:
That's right. We saw this creature
deep inside Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0018
rows.name:
It serves as a steward of all life on
Mira, and is said to cull the impure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0019
rows.name: It has never been defeated in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0020
rows.name:
And Tora want Team Tatsu
to fight it? Tora crazy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0021
rows.name:
But it's crucial we help this
sick Nopon, right, Tora?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0022
rows.name:
Tora value his life above
all other Nopon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0023
rows.name:
Then it's settled. We'll
get you that scale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0024
rows.name: Elma...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086302_MSG0025
rows.name:
I won't allow the future of the Nopon
people to be threatened on my watch.[ST:wait ]
